title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at NCC Urban

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at NCC Urban
jsonLd.description:
NCC Urban has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NCC Urban:
NCC Urban is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NCC Urban!
